title: JECP Payment Requirements (x402 integration)
description: Schema for items inside the `payment.accepts[]` array on HTTP 402 PAYMENT_REQUIRED responses (06-x402-integration.md §2). Two variants: `stripe-wallet` (JECP-defined) and `exact` (x402 v1).

scheme.description: Identifies the Stripe-funded wallet payment path.

amount_usd.description: USD amount required for this invocation. Float in dollars (e.g., 0.20 = 20 US cents).

topup_url.description: URL the agent's UI redirects the user to in order to top up the wallet. SHOULD include a `return` query parameter that resumes the original invocation after top-up completes.

scheme.description: x402 v1 fixed-amount scheme. The only x402 scheme accepted in JECP v1.1.0.

network.description: Lowercase EVM network identifier. v1.1.0 mandates `base` for production. `base-sepolia` MAY be used in test mode (`JECP_TEST_MODE=true`).

asset.description: ERC-20 contract address. Base mainnet USDC = `0x833589fCD6eDb6E08f4c7C32D4f71b54bdA02913`.

asset_symbol.description: Human-readable symbol for the asset (e.g., 'USDC'). Informational; clients MUST trust the contract address, not the symbol.

asset_decimals.description: Decimals of the asset (USDC = 6). Required to convert `max_amount_required` to a human-readable value.

max_amount_required.description: Atomic units of the asset as a decimal string. NOT a USD float. USDC has 6 decimals → '200000' = 0.200 USDC. Hubs MUST emit this as a string to avoid JSON Number precision loss for amounts > 2^53.

pay_to.description: EVM address that MUST receive the asset transfer. In v1.1.0 conformant Hubs MUST set this to the JECP Splitter contract address (06-x402-integration.md §8). MUST NOT be a Hub-controlled EOA, MUST NOT be a Provider-controlled EOA.

resource.description: Absolute URL of the resource being accessed. Hubs MUST emit the canonical `/v1/invoke` URL.

description.description: Human-readable description of what is being paid for (e.g., 'Payment for capability jobdonebot/bg-remover-pro').

mime_type.description: Expected response MIME type. Echoed for x402-spec compliance.

max_timeout_seconds.description: Maximum seconds the agent's signed authorization MAY remain valid. Hubs SHOULD emit 60.

name.description: EIP-712 domain separator `name` field. USDC: `'USD Coin'`.

splitter_capability_id.description: 32-byte (`0x`-prefixed 64-hex) identifier of the capability's split registration in the Splitter contract. Reproducible off-chain as `keccak256(utf8(provider_namespace + ':' + action_id))` per 06-x402-integration.md §8.2.

facilitator_url.description: URL of the x402 facilitator the Hub will use for verification. Allows agents to optimize wallet pre-funding.
